mapper.select: SELECT p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, NVL(p.view_count, 0) AS view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS placeRegDate, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, NVL(ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1), 0) AS avg_rating, a.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a.description, 4000, 1) AS description, a.phone, a.price, a.status, a.areacode FROM place p JOIN accommodation a ON p.place_id = a.accommodation_id LEFT JOIN review r ON p.place_id = r.place_id AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' WHERE p.place_id = #{value} AND p.place_type = 'ACC' GROUP BY p.place_id, p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at, a.accommodation_id, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(a.description, 4000, 1), a.phone, a.price, a.status, a.areacode

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.review_id, r.user_id, r.place_id, r.rating, r.content, r.status, r.created_at AS reviewDate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM review r WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} AND r.status = 'DISPLAY' ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= (#{offset} + #{limit})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE place_id = #{value} AND status = 'DISPLAY'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite ( favorite_id, user_id, place_id, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_FAVORITE.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{placeId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
